name: shopify-mcp-pro
description: Shopify MCP with real analytics (ShopifyQL), auto-refresh auth, and Shopify API 2026-04.
long_description:
Production-grade Shopify MCP server. Fixes the analytics gap in stock implementations by exposing ShopifyQL for real sales / customer / inventory queries, auto-refreshes OAuth tokens, and targets the current Shopify API 2026-04.

What you get via the agent:
• Real analytics via ShopifyQL — sales by product / variant / collection, customer cohorts, inventory turn, marketing ROI — answered as data, not screenshots.
• Auto-refresh auth — long-running agent sessions don't break on token expiry.
• Shopify Admin API 2026-04 — products, variants, orders, customers, draft orders, fulfillments, refunds, discounts, metafields, metaobjects, redirects, gift cards, webhooks, all read+write.
• Reporting endpoints — sales, traffic, conversion, marketing, financial summary, abandoned checkouts.

Open-source fork of the original shopify-mcp with all the breakages from 2026 API versions patched. See the README for the full tool list and credential setup.

shopify_store_domain.title: Shopify Store Domain
shopify_store_domain.description: Your Shopify store domain, e.g. my-store.myshopify.com

shopify_client_id.title: Shopify Client ID
shopify_client_id.description: Client ID from Shopify Dev Dashboard → your custom app.

shopify_client_secret.title: Shopify Client Secret
shopify_client_secret.description: Client Secret from Shopify Dev Dashboard → your custom app.
